content:
Work-In-Propress feature release for the import/export code used by the game has been added, along with some better navigation design like tabs and whatnot for a few elements.

Essentially, this allows you to
- Copy a lineup from the game into the planner using the copy button next to "Quick Team Lineup"
- Export a lineup from the builder into the game, using the import button next to the previously mentioned copy button ingame

**Current limitations mean that we only support Awakeners and Wheels right now**, as we have not mapped out covenants and posses to support this format, but eventually everything will work.

thanks to **zekiei**, **fishhazardthewizard** and **frosthief** for their work mapping out the import strings!

**heransu** has also been kind enough with their time, helping migration of full awakener data into a more usable structure for the eventual database work, soon™
